app_release_notes: v1.0.5 - Quality-of-life update: press and hold the minus/plus buttons to spin ladder numbers fast, Past Loads and Rework a Saved Load now find every load you've saved, and the built-in User Guide and Help are refreshed for the new Measure workflow.
